description: You are a General Operations Manager responsible for inventory optimization across a multi-warehouse distribution network. The SUPPLY_CHAIN schema in Oracle (Host=localhost, Port=1521, Service=XEPDB1, User=sc_manager, Password=Supply2024) contains inventory, demand history, and warehouse data. The current inventory system has misconfigured reorder points and safety stock levels causing stockouts and excess inventory. Analyze demand patterns in the DEMAND_HISTORY table by calculating a 12-week moving average demand per SKU per warehouse, demand variability (coefficient of variation) per SKU, and seasonal indices using the ratio-to-moving-average method, writing results to the DEMAND_ANALYSIS table. Correct misconfigured values in the INVENTORY_PARAMS table—specifically addressing
